title: Vishing & Smishing 📱
description: When the hack comes through your phone or SMS.

slides.title: Vishing 📞
slides.content:
### Voice Phishing

**Vishing** is phishing over the phone. Hackers often use **Caller ID Spoofing** to make it look like they are calling from your bank or the government.

*   **Tip**: Never give info over a call you didn't start. Hang up and call the official number!

slides.title: Smishing ✉️
slides.content:
### SMS Phishing

**Smishing** is phishing via text message. It's surprisingly effective because people trust texts more than emails.

*   **Example**: "Your package is delayed. Click here to confirm your address: `bit.ly/scam-link`"

quizData.question: You receive a text from 'FedEx' saying you need to pay a $2 shipping fee to receive a package. This is an example of:
quizData.explanation: Smishing is Phishing via SMS (Text Message).
